goal: Fix pre-existing E0597 lifetime errors in apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/pty.rs. Discovered during task 53-17 icon fix and confirmed in 53-08 Clerk wiring — 'cargo check' still fails on 2 lifetime errors after both unrelated fixes landed. Root cause likely: the PTY writer is taken+stored on the async task but the session map lock scope doesn't outlive the reader thread. Re-structure so writer/reader references have 'static-compatible lifetimes (Arc<Mutex<>> pattern). Success: 'cd apps/desktop/src-tauri && cargo check' exits 0. Unblocks 'cargo build' / 'tauri build' / CI (task 53-09). Do NOT refactor pty.rs behavior — fix lifetimes only, keep the four commands (pty_open/write/resize/close) identical.
